---
output: html_document
pagetitle: Josh Leon
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

library(tidyverse)
```

Here's my website

```{r, echo=FALSE,fig.align='center',fig.width=.1, fig.height=.1}
knitr::include_graphics('./media/headshot.JPG')
```
